name: p0-cracked-roof-tile-distant
description: There's a cracked roof tile on my house. The roof is two storeys up, so I took a photo from the ground but the tile is small in frame. I can see one tile that looks cracked across the middle. Concrete tile, looks like the rest.

hypotheses.label: Single cracked tile — direct replacement
evidence_for: User describes one visible crack across a single concrete tile
evidence_against: Photo distance makes it impossible to rule out adjacent damage or underlayment failure

hypotheses.label: Cracked tile with damaged underlayment from leak
evidence_for: Cracked tiles commonly let water reach the underlayment and rot it over time
evidence_against: Photo doesn't show interior ceiling condition or visible water staining

hypotheses.label: Broader sun-weathering pattern across the roof slope
evidence_for: Cape Town western slopes commonly show clustered tile cracking from UV exposure
evidence_against: Distant photo can't confirm whether more than one tile is affected

mockAgentOutput.what_we_dont_know: Whether the visible crack is an isolated tile or part of a wider weathering pattern, and whether the underlayment below it has been damaged.
mockAgentOutput.why_it_matters: A single tile is a quick swap; multiple tiles with damaged underlayment is a partial re-roof — very different quote.

chips.text: Send a closer photo (drone, long lens, or from the roof itself).
There is a damp patch on the ceiling under that tile.
Other tiles nearby look similarly weathered or cracked.

committed_observations: photo taken from ground level two storeys below
explicit_unknowns: whether adjacent tiles are also affected

expected.must_ask_about: a closer photo or a check of the ceiling below the affected tile

failure_baseline_today.observed_behaviour: System asks generic 'send a clearer photo' without naming what specifically would resolve the uncertainty (tile-level vs ceiling-level information).
failure_baseline_today.why_it_fails: Phase 4 image_sufficiency='partial' is the missing signal — the system has a photo but the resolution at the relevant area is too low. The current prompt has no instruction to articulate what dimension of the image is insufficient.

expected.phase_6_ask_rationale: Top hypothesis confidence_alone=0.45 (<0.75), gap to second=0.05 (<0.25). A closer photo or a ceiling check would meaningfully partition the hypothesis space — so ask, not commit_low_confidence.
